## Description

Please include a summary of the change and which issue it fixes or feature it implements.

Fixes # (issue)

## Type of change

Please delete options that are not relevant.

- [ ] Bug fix (non-breaking change which fixes an issue in reference code)
- [ ] Protocol addition (new feature in the protocol specification)
- [ ] Documentation update (fixes or additions to the docs)
- [ ] Schema change (updates to JSON schemas or validation rules)

## Checklist

- [ ] My code or documentation follows the style guidelines of this project
- [ ] I have performed a self-review of my own changes
- [ ] I have commented my code/specifications, particularly in hard-to-understand areas
- [ ] I have made corresponding changes to the documentation (THE_BUILD_MANUAL.md, etc.)
- [ ] My changes generate no new warnings or schema validation errors
